title: Mahadeva Temple, Itagi
tagline: Mahadeva Temple, Itagi — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: The Mahadeva Temple is located in the town of Itagi in Yelburga Taluk, in the Koppal District of Karnataka state, India.
overview.description: The Mahadeva Temple is located in the town of Itagi in Yelburga Taluk, in the Koppal District of Karnataka state, India. It is about 7 km (4 mi) from Kuknur and 20 km (12 mi) from Lakkundi.

topPlaces.name: Navalinga Temple
topPlaces.description: The Navalinga temple is a cluster of Hindu temples built in the 9th century, during the reign of King Amoghavarsha I or his son Krishna II of the Rashtrakuta Dynasty. The temple is located in the town of Kukkanur (also called Kuknur), 4 miles (6 km) north of Itagi in Koppal district and 25 miles (40 km) east of Gadag in Karnataka state, India.

topPlaces.name: Mandalagiri
topPlaces.description: Mandalagiri is a village in the Yelburga taluk of Koppal district in the Indian state of Karnataka. Mandalagiri is 10 km from Kuknoor and 30 km from Gadag.

topPlaces.name: Mannapur
topPlaces.description: Mannapur is a village in the Koppal district in Karnataka state, India.

topPlaces.name: Bhatapanahalli
topPlaces.description: Bhatapanahalli is a village in the Yelburga taluk of Koppal district in the Indian state of Karnataka. Bhatapanahalli is 6 km from Kuknoor and 40 km from Gadag.

topPlaces.name: Malekoppa, Koppal
topPlaces.description: Malekoppa is a village in the Koppal district of Karnataka state, India.

topPlaces.name: Kuknur
topPlaces.description: Kuknoor (also known as Kuknur, Kukkanur or Kukanoor) is a town in Kukanoor taluk in the Koppal District of the Indian state of Karnataka, which is located about 40 km northwest of Hospet and 7 km from the Mahadeva Temple in Itagi. Kuknoor is known for the temples of the Rashtrakutas and Chalukyas in the town, with the most notable being the Navalinga Temple.

topPlaces.name: Dyampur
topPlaces.description: Dyampur is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Yelburga taluk of Koppal district, Raichur.

topPlaces.name: Bannikoppa
topPlaces.description: Bannikoppa is a village in the Koppal district of Karnataka state, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mahadeva Temple, Itagi?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mahadeva Temple, Itagi is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mahadeva Temple, Itagi?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Hubli Airport (95 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (90 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mahadeva Temple, Itagi?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mahadeva Temple, Itagi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mahadeva Temple, Itagi?
faq.a: Stays in Mahadeva Temple, Itagi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mahadeva Temple, Itagi?
faq.a: The top attractions are Navalinga Temple, Mandalagiri, Mannapur, Bhatapanahalli, Malekoppa, Koppal.
